source_apis.expected_response_format: Public port operation rows with vessel, port, ETA/ATA/ETD/ATD, berth fields
source_apis.product_value: Core vessel universe, current port, sales target timing
source_apis.known_blocker: Set PORT_OPERATION_SERVICE_KEY or an accepted fallback key. PORT_OPERATION_API_URL can use the default endpoint.
source_apis.implementation_gap: Set PORT_OPERATION_SERVICE_KEY or an accepted fallback key. PORT_OPERATION_API_URL can use the default endpoint.
source_apis.recommended_next_action: Continue targeted enrichment; avoid loading this source on Overview.

source_apis.expected_response_format: CSV with verified vessel identity and company fields
source_apis.recommended_next_action: Create a smaller verified vessel reference CSV and preserve previous cache.

source_apis.known_blocker: Set PILOT_SOURCE_URLS to one or more allowed pilot schedule URLs.
source_apis.implementation_gap: Set PILOT_SOURCE_URLS to one or more allowed pilot schedule URLs.
source_apis.recommended_next_action: Continue targeted enrichment; avoid loading this source on Overview.

source_apis.implementation_gap: Set BERTH_SOURCE_URLS or PNC_SOURCE_URLS. Current collector directly uses PNC_SOURCE_URLS for berth-like feeds.
